since_last: 54% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.10%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.32% · BTC +0.12% · Gold +0.18% · Nasdaq100 +0.86%. 54% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.10%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.10%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +6.37%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +6.37%, AMBA +5.48%, TER +5.43%, BABA +4.73%, BIDU +4.29%. Laggards: ORCL -3.66%, AI -3.34%, ADBE -2.56%, AAPL -2.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.67% at $123.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
